## Source: ghsa-malware (22917b30a80ecd28b956d5c3fbe86c4a52676ebb524aa54c2707e323490bbd11)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (537d9d482d3e99b2757022edbff8c81e9a9bd9bf73f272f10634d355c813e635)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'fluent-plugin-enhance-k8s-metadata' @ 5.0.1 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:
- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

It is considered malicious because:

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
